title: Mustardy Crunchy Indian Rice Curry
description: A kid-friendly, Jain-friendly, Indian (Udupi-style) dish with a tangy mustard flavor and a satisfying crunch. Serve with naan or roti.

ingredients.name: Ferment kimchi
ingredients.notes: use kimchi with a mild flavor

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the red chili powder, coriander powder, and salt. Mix well.
Add the uncooked rice and mix until the rice is well coated with the spice mixture.
Add the ferment kimchi, mustard seeds, and instant yeast (if using). Mix well.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Fluff the rice with a fork and garnish with chopped cilantro and crunchy tempeh bits.
Serve hot with naan or roti.
Optional: ferment the rice mixture for 2-3 days before cooking for a stronger flavor.
